acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: credential-shaped config is documented or guarded without exposing secret material
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Grafana compose now requires GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD, docs/environment-variables.md adds secret-hygiene guidance, services/pg_schema.sql uses a placeholder password, and CONFIG_STRUCTURE_EXPLANATION.md plus CONFIG_CONSOLIDATION_SUMMARY.md no longer contain a literal password-looking value.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: tenant/channel observability labels avoid PII and high-cardinality values
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: notification dispatch metrics use bounded tenant_id/channel_id/worker/status labels, TestValidateMetricLabelsRejectsPIIAndSecrets and TestRecordDispatchUsesSafeTenantChannelLabels passed, and the new dashboard aggregates with topk rather than exposing raw high-cardinality slices.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: secret backend unavailable and unsafe config failure modes have value-gate evidence
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: TestEnvProviderCredentialResolver passed for missing secret references, TestValidateMetricLabelsRejectsPIIAndSecrets covers unsafe label rejection, and slices/TMP-015-platform-ops-secret-observability/value-gate-report.md maps the evidence.

findings: Agent reported blockers: ["The requested `slice-harness status` verification crashes with `KeyError: 'class'` on planned slices, so that command could not complete in this environment."]

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: dry-run reports table-level counts and readiness without mutating data
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Dry-run now uses a read-only default-tenant lookup, prints per-table eligible/blocked/conflict counts plus readiness, and the throwaway PostgreSQL smoke confirmed tenants stayed unchanged after dry-run.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: migration backfills eligible legacy rows to tenant_key=legacy-default idempotently
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Apply uses batched updates over eligible rows only; the smoke backfilled 15 rows, a second apply moved 0 rows, and post-apply dry-run reported zero eligible legacy rows.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: rollback target or reviewed rollback script restores nullable tenant compatibility
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Rollback mode nulls rows currently on the default tenant, deletes the orphan default tenant when possible, and the smoke restored all 15 rows back to nullable tenant ownership.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: value-gate report maps all criteria to named evidence
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: Created `slices/TMP-011-migration-and-data-isolation/value-gate-report.md` with criterion IDs, files, test names, assertion types, verdicts, and smoke evidence references.

findings: Agent reported blockers: ["The requested `slice-harness status` verification crashes with `KeyError: 'class'` on planned slices, so that command could not complete in this environment."]
